basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Nagpur Medical Physicist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS) Nagpur
basic_details.application_mode: Through Email (with prescribed format and certificates)
basic_details.selection_process_brief: Scrutiny → Written Examination + Interview → Merit List
basic_details.short_information: AIIMS Nagpur is offering a golden opportunity for freshly qualified Medical Physicists to gain one-year hands-on clinical training in Radiation Oncology under expert supervision at a premier medical institute.

age_limit.age_details: As per AIIMS / Government of India norms

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Medical/Radiological Physics from AERB approved institutions
qualification.details: Candidates must have successfully completed the Medical Physics course on or before July 2026 from AERB-listed institutions. | Essential Qualification: | Post Graduate Degree in Physics + Post M.Sc. Diploma in Radiological/Medical Physics from a recognized university, OR Basic Degree in Science with Physics + Post Graduate Degree in Radiological/Medical Physics from a recognized university. | Stipend: Rs. 12,000/- per month Duration: One Year

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications and certificates Shortlisting based on bio-data Written Examination + Interview Preparation of merit/rank list First two candidates will be selected; waitlist will be maintained
how_to_apply: Download the prescribed application format from AIIMS Nagpur website.
Fill the form completely and attach PDF copies of all relevant certificates.
Send the application through email to [email protected]
You can also send by post to: Dean (Academics), Admin Block, Plot No.2, Sector-20, MIHAN, Nagpur-441124.
Note: Applications received after the last date will be summarily rejected.
important_instructions: No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in written test/interview. Accommodation will not be provided. Selected candidates must undergo medical fitness test at AIIMS Nagpur. Application Fee: NIL Candidates must submit an undertaking to abide by the rules of AIIMS Nagpur.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Nagpur Medical Physicist Internship Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS) Nagpur, established under Pradhan Mantri Swasthya Suraksha Yojana (PMSSY), has invited applications from Indian Nationals for the One Year Medical Physicist Internship Programme in the Department of Radiation Oncology. The Executive Director, AIIMS Nagpur invites applications in the prescribed format for this stipend-based internship. Download AIIMS Nagpur Medical Physicist Internship Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Nagpur Medical Physicist Internship Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: AIIMS Nagpur is offering a golden opportunity for freshly qualified Medical Physicists to gain one-year hands-on clinical training in Radiation Oncology under expert supervision at a premier medical institute.

rows.all_india_institute_of_medical_sciences_: Through Email (with prescribed format and certificates)
Scrutiny → Written Examination + Interview → Merit List
Post Graduate in Medical/Radiological Physics from AERB approved institutions
As per AIIMS / Government of India norms

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Nagpur Medical Physicist Internship Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must have successfully completed the Medical Physics course on or before July 2026 from AERB-listed institutions. Essential Qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Physics + Post M.Sc. Diploma in Radiological/Medical Physics from a recognized university, OR Basic Degree in Science with Physics + Post Graduate Degree in Radiological/Medical Physics from a recognized university. Stipend: Rs. 12,000/- per month Duration: One Year

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Scrutiny of applications and certificates Shortlisting based on bio-data Written Examination + Interview Preparation of merit/rank list First two candidates will be selected; waitlist will be maintained

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for AIIMS Nagpur Medical Physicist Internship 2026
content_sections.text: Download the prescribed application format from AIIMS Nagpur website. Fill the form completely and attach PDF copies of all relevant certificates. Send the application through email to [email protected] You can also send by post to: Dean (Academics), Admin Block, Plot No.2, Sector-20, MIHAN, Nagpur-441124. Note: Applications received after the last date will be summarily rejected.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in written test/interview. Accommodation will not be provided. Selected candidates must undergo medical fitness test at AIIMS Nagpur. Application Fee: NIL Candidates must submit an undertaking to abide by the rules of AIIMS Nagpur.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Nagpur Medical Physicist Internship 2026?
faq.answer: The last date is 25 July 2026 (up to 05:00 PM).

faq.question: Q2. How many seats are available in AIIMS Nagpur Medical Physicist Internship Programme?
faq.answer: Total 02 internship positions are available.

faq.question: Q3. What is the stipend for Medical Physicist Intern at AIIMS Nagpur?
faq.answer: Selected interns will receive Rs. 12,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What qualification is required for AIIMS Nagpur Medical Physicist Internship?
faq.answer: Post Graduate Degree/Diploma in Medical/Radiological Physics from AERB-approved institutions.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Nagpur Internship 2026?
faq.answer: No, the application fee is NIL.

faq.question: Q6. What is the duration of the Medical Physicist Internship at AIIMS Nagpur?
faq.answer: The internship period is One Year.

faq.question: Q7. How to apply for AIIMS Nagpur Medical Physicist Internship Programme?
faq.answer: Send the prescribed application form with certificates to [email protected]

faq.question: Q8. Will there be a written exam for AIIMS Nagpur Medical Physicist selection?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates will have to appear for Written Examination and Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is accommodation provided to interns at AIIMS Nagpur?
faq.answer: No, accommodation will not be provided.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to apply for AIIMS Nagpur Internship 2026?
faq.answer: PDF copies of educational certificates, degree, diploma and other relevant documents.
